name: Eldtree Snare
descs:
Attack Skills(except E.G.O Skills) that inflict [Sinking] Potency, Count, or 'Unique Sinking' deal +5% damage.

For Skills with 2- Coins, gain Clash Power +1 and deal +10% damage instead.

Attack Skills(except E.G.O Skills) that inflict [Sinking] Potency, Count, or 'Unique Sinking' deal +<style="upgradeHighlight">7.5</style>% damage.

For Skills with 2- Coins, gain Clash Power +1 and deal +<style="upgradeHighlight">12.5</style>% damage instead.

Attack Skills(except E.G.O Skills) that inflict [Sinking] Potency, Count, or 'Unique Sinking' deal +<style="upgradeHighlight">10</style>% damage.

For Skills with 2- Coins, gain Clash Power +1 and deal +<style="upgradeHighlight">15</style>% damage instead.
